$note: Single source of truth for the settings schema (substrate S5). Guards src/main/settings.js against drift (npm run settings:check) and generates mobile Swift/Kotlin enums + defaults (npm run settings:build). Enums and defaults MUST NOT fork across platforms; labels are shared copy. The `appIcon` value is sanitized on read the same way it is validated on write, and supporter icons are allowed only when a supporter license is active (see settings.js isAppIconAllowed). `supporter` is written only by the activation flow, never by generic setSettings.
$internalDefaults: Keys present in settings.js DEFAULTS that are intentionally desktop-only (not mobile-parity settings); settings:check allowlists these instead of requiring them in the schema.

settings.note: supporter ids allowed only when supporter active; sanitize-on-read == validate-on-write

settings.normalize: trim, lowercase, strip leading www., dedupe

settings.note: written only by the Polar activation flow (setSupporter), never generic setSettings
